consistency.data_completeness: Complete. All standard spell fields are present.
consistency.mechanics_cohesion: Cohesive. The components, range, and duration support the effect (creating a temporary, short-range mental link).

quality.readability: High. Description is clear and directly explains the telepathic link and its limitations (Int score, plane restriction).
quality.component_detail: Good. Material component is specific and thematic.
quality.level_vs_effect: Appropriate for a 5th-level spell. Providing communication for up to 8 creatures over any distance (within the same plane) for 1 hour is a significant utility spell, fitting for 5th level.

mechanics.range_and_target: 30 feet range, up to 8 willing creatures. Limited by initial casting range but unbounded once linked (within plane).
mechanics.duration_and_concentration: 1 hour, no concentration required (this is a strong point for utility, as it frees up concentration for combat spells).
mechanics.restrictions: Creatures with Intelligence 2 or less are immune. This is a standard inclusion for mental/telepathic effects to prevent interaction with very low-intelligence beasts.
mechanics.communication_scope: Telepathic communication, ignores language barriers, global range (on the plane).
mechanics.class_availability: Wizard only (as per RAW data provided).

recommendations.none: Data is accurate and consistent based on standard D&D 5e spell structures.
